top_signals.title: EU Calls on Spain to Cut Gas Use for Stability Post-Blackout
top_signals.summary: The European Commission has called on Spain to move away from using gas-fired power plants to stabilize its electricity system after last year’s blackout, saying better grids, interconnections and more storage should replace the emergency measures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
